main.name: Hrushikesh Jadhav
main.description: Currently studying for my Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science
main.bio: Hi! I'm Hrushikesh Jadhav and I love Gaming. I'm a Full Stack Web Developer based in Mumbai. My skillsets include languages like JavaScript, CSS, HTML5, Python together with frameworks like ReactJs and Django. Currently, I'm a student at Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology while also working as a freelancer. I do this because I love the process of turning my ideas into reality by converting them into code. I have a serious passion for designing top-grade web applications using various machine learning and AI models to create a dynamic user experience.
main.contactmessage: Get in touch with me to receive further details, get coached or anything else.

testimonials.text: Here you should write some nice things that someone has said about you. No lies though, employers can tell when you are lying.

That Sonny Sangha must be one of the most brilliant developers I've ever met! It is amazing that nobody has hired him yet. Hey you, you should hire this guy, he may be fresh out of University and have zero on the job experience but I am confident that he will be one of your best developers in no time!
